displayTitle: The Film Is Evidence, the Code Is Law

beats.narration: A weld radiograph turns a strip of film into an accept-or-reject decision that has to survive an audit. Order is not optional.

payload.title: READ IT IN ORDER
payload.sub: Film validity before any flaw call.

beats.narration: First prove the film valid: density, required IQI, markers, no backscatter B. Then rule out artifacts. Only then identify, measure, apply the code.
Less metal prints dark; more metal, light. The hard part is four dark lines: penetration on centerline, fusion on the bevel, wandering crack, irregular slag.

payload.heading: Four dark lines, four calls
payload.note: ID HONESTLY — THE WRONG NAME FAILS THE AUDIT

beats.narration: Acceptance is workmanship, not reference plates. Cracks, fusion, and penetration are rejected outright. Slag is measured by length. Porosity is compared to a chart.
Same slag line can pass one code and fail another, so apply the table the contract names. The film is evidence; the code is law.

payload.sub: Identify honestly, measure honestly, apply the named table.
